packages.name: cron
packages.description: Deterministic global scheduler object: a job is one due datetime + one stamped message to one allowlisted target; trust-gated, persistent via injectable store, retry/backoff

packages.name: browser
packages.description: Web browser object for agents: render/click/type/back with compact replies. Two modes — allowlist (fail-closed) or denylist (allow any public host except a blocklist); denylist requires a deployment-provided IP-filtering egress proxy for sub-resource SSRF containment. 0.2.0: allow_sync runtime grants (source-gated, injectable grants store, empty-floor kill switch).

packages.name: metrics
packages.description: Fire-and-forget operational counters object: closed key allowlist, in-memory totals, periodic flush to an injectable durable store

packages.name: tips
packages.description: Rotating-content dispenser: fragment pools assembled per recipient by a configurable slot template — seen-tracked no-repeat rotation for content slots, weighted random dressing slots, seeded deterministic draw/commit (crash-safe retries), pending→live→retired lifecycle, persistence via injectable store
